description: Editor utility functions including viewport camera control

functions.name: SetLevelViewportCameraInfo
functions.description: Sets information about the camera position for the primary level editor viewport.

functions.name: GetLevelViewportCameraInfo
functions.description: Gets information about the camera position for the primary level editor viewport.  In non-editor builds, these will be zeroed

functions.name: GetEditorWorld
functions.description: Find the World in the world editor. It can then be used as WorldContext by other libraries like GameplayStatics.
